chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 875 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 22.01.2026 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Brohi, Advocate for applicant. Complainant is present in person. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for the applicant files statement along with certified copies of affidavits of the legal heirs filed before the learned trial Court. Complainant and the other legal heir, present in the Court, also extend their no objection. Learned DPG, on account of the compromise acquired between the parties, extends his no objection on account of the sections imposed in the matter. Accordingly, without touching the merits, on the ground of compromise having been effected between the parties, the order dated 17.09.2025, whereby the applicant was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail, stands confirmed. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
